title: review_output
description: The one and only output shape every code-review-perspective agent must emit: a rating out of 100 and the notes explaining why it is not 100 and how to reach 100.

rating.description: Integer score from 0 (worst through this lens) to 100 (nothing to improve through this lens).

notes.description: When rating < 100: the reason the line/function/script is not 100 AND what would make it 100. When rating == 100: a statement that no change is needed.
